features: The package includes:happy birthday balloon banner + 4pcs blue confetti latex balloons + 4pcs light blue balloons + 4pcs dark blue balloons +4pcs White latex balloons + 1 roll ribbon, perfect birthday decorations, bring you a unique and wonderful party.

High Quality Birthday Party Decoration: The birthday banner is made of high-quality paper, eco-friendly, safety, no smell. The birthday balloons are made of double layer latex, sturdy and durable, so you don't have to worry about the balloon bursting after inflation. All colorful balloons and confetti balloons can support helium or air. After using, you can fold and store these colorful birthday decorations for next time using.

Size of happy birthday banner: The size of each large happy birthday banners cards are 16cm x 12cm, which is durable, reusable and environmentally. The spacing between the letters cards is adjustable, you can move the it to have a different look.

Easy Decoration: Using the ribbon to hang"HAPPYBIRTHDAY" balloons banner on wall, window, ceiling or in courtyard, it is very easy to decorate the party.The balloons are perfect for birthday party decorations, you can stick the balloons to the wall or string them as banner and hang up to create a unique party scene or backdrop.

Various Decoration: This banner would be perfect for any age, birthday boy, birthday girl, and adult birthdays too. It would make a great backdrop for party photos, decorate a wall, windows, as a photo prop and more. You can personalize it to your taste and occasion. You can enjoy the fun of popping the balloons and the glitter shower on the party.
